sevenDay.synopsis: Things are looking good except for some IFR to our W. We will remain VFR and hazard-free for the PM/N1. IFR rolls in tomorrow AM, and we'll see some ISOLD showers/TS mainly during the PM/early N1. IFR again Sunday AM, and still a small chance of PM showers. Monday will probably be our best day with rain seemingly off the table. By Tuesday, we'll be back in the pattern of AM IFR and PM showers/TS.
sevenDay.title: 7-DAY OUTLOOK: 24 APR - 30 APR
